creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the report.

A crash could have many causes. It could also be an upstream bug or a bug in any of the various libraries used by asterisk.

To further diagnose the issue I need some more information, at least:

- FreeBSD version/revision
- Did you install the binary package or from ports?
- If compiling from the port, the options used
- Since you have a crash, what kind of crash? could you compile the port with debugging enabled and send me a backtrace using gdb? This is required to understand why asterisk is crashing.

You say it crashes when using the web interface. This is a feature I don't use normally, could you give me detailed information on how to reproduce the crash? Are you using the default configuration or have customised it?
